name: cc-manager
description: Interactive manager CLI that uses Codex to control Claude Code

scripts.ext:copy-src: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');function cp(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){const sp=p.join(s,e.name),dp=p.join(d,e.name);e.isDirectory()?cp(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}cp('src','extension/src');const cd='extension/claude-parser';fs.mkdirSync(cd,{recursive:true});for(const f of['index.js','parse-stream.js','package.json'])fs.copyFileSync(p.join('claude-parser',f),p.join(cd,f));cp('qa-desktop','extension/qa-desktop')"
scripts.ext:build: npm run ext:copy-src && cd extension && npx @vscode/vsce package --allow-missing-repository -o cc-manager.vsix
